title: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush
summary: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush is an upcoming 2026 racing game from the developers behind Hot Wheels Unleashed & Hot Wheels Unleashed 2: Turbocharged. Developed and published by Milestone S.r.l., the game is set to be released on 24 September 2026, for the Xbox Series X/S, PlayStation 5, Nintendo Switch 2 and Microsoft Windows.

title: Takara Tomy
summary:
center|300px
Takara Tomy is a brand name and manufacturer of toys, games, and other media based out of Katsushika, Japan formed with the March 1, 2006 merging of Takara founded by Yasuta Sato in 1955 and Tomy founded by Eiichirō Tomiyama in 1924. Hot Wheels has collaborated with and consulted the group on many occasions since 2002 to create new castings, series, and card games....

title: Jeremy Padawer
summary: Created page with " Jeremy Padawer (born October 26, 1973) was Marketing Manager for Hot Wheels from 2001 to 2003. He was hired by Mattel shortly after he completed college. His first pitch at the company was for the K.I.T. Racing series which he described as “disastrous” due to scaring Kroger buyers with a “mad scientist” impression. Padawer did work with Nick..."
